description: As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System. Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy. Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes. Her previous roles include: Director of Adult Social Care Policy Director of Health Protection Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

details.body:
As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System.

Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy.

Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes.

Her previous roles include:

  • Director of Adult Social Care Policy
  • Director of Health Protection
  • Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team
  • Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health
  • Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System.

Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy.

Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes.

Her previous roles include:

  • Director of Adult Social Care Policy
  • Director of Health Protection
  • Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team
  • Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health
  • Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

This role oversees the Domestic and Economic Pillar, including the Economic and Domestic Affairs Secretariat and 10 Data Science - advising the Prime Minister and Chief Secretary to the Prime Minister on economic and domestic affairs.

role_appointments.title: Clara Swinson - Second Permanent Secretary, Cabinet Office

details.body:
As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System.

Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy.

Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes.

Her previous roles include:

  • Director of Adult Social Care Policy
  • Director of Health Protection
  • Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team
  • Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health
  • Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System.

Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy.

Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes.

Her previous roles include:

  • Director of Adult Social Care Policy
  • Director of Health Protection
  • Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team
  • Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health
  • Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

The Director General, Global and Public Health is responsible for:

  • emergency preparedness
  • health protection
  • health improvement
  • public health systems
  • Chief Public Health Nurse Office
  • international engagement on health
  • supply resilience
  • COVID-19 Inquiry response

role_appointments.title: Clara Swinson - Director General, Global and Public Health

details.body:
As Second Permanent Secretary at the Ministry of Justice, Clara provides system leadership across the Criminal Justice System.

Prior to this, Clara spent 18 months as Second Permanent Secretary at the Cabinet Office, where she led the Domestic and Economic Pillar and provided critical advice to the Prime Minister and Cabinet Office Ministers, covering Mission delivery, the Plan for Change, and Cabinet and collective agreement across all domestic and economic policy.

Before that, Clara served for nearly a decade as Director General for Global and Public Health at the Department of Health and Social Care, where her work in this department included the coronavirus response and extensive social care programmes.

Her previous roles include:

  • Director of Adult Social Care Policy
  • Director of Health Protection
  • Deputy Director, Cross Government Obesity Team
  • Principal Private Secretary to the Secretary of State for Health
  • Health account manager, Prime Minister’s Delivery Unit

Part of DHSC’s senior team, the Director General is responsible for leading health teams, including:

  • emergency preparedness and health protection policy
  • international
  • EU and trade
  • social distancing strategy
  • vaccines deployment
  • therapeutics taskforce
  • COVID-19 programme
